## Tool name

Name the platform, API, CLI, WordPress plugin, or service.

## Official docs

Add official API, SDK, CLI, webhook, or developer documentation links.

## Agent operations

List the actions an AI agent should be able to perform with this tool.

## Authentication

Describe the token, OAuth, API key, or application-password method.

## Related skills

List any skills that should reference this tool.
